title: 'Achazyah #0274
definition:
Ahaziah = "Jehovah (Yahu) holds (possesses)"

 1) ruler of Israel, son of Ahab
 2) ruler of Judah, son of Jehoram (Joram)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahaziah = "Jehovah (Yahu) holds (possesses)"

 1) ruler of Israel, son of Ahab
 2) ruler of Judah, son of Jehoram (Joram)

    NASB:  Yah has grasped, the name of several Isr.
